# ResumeTracker AI

> AI-powered resume feedback and a clean kanban for tracking every job application from saved to offer.

ResumeTracker AI helps job seekers improve their resumes with an estimated ATS compatibility score, actionable rewrite suggestions, and a built-in pipeline for organizing applications.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and entry point.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create a free account.
